# glasgate.ai

> AI-ready data pipelines for the web. Turn any website into clean, structured data for AI agents and automations.

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://glasgate.ai/) - Overview of AI-ready data pipelines.
- [Platform](https://glasgate.ai/platform) - Crawling, structuring, and delivery pipeline.
- [Pricing](https://glasgate.ai/pricing) - Plans for teams of all sizes.
- [Docs](https://glasgate.ai/docs) - API reference, quickstart and integration guides.

## AI-readable Files

- [Full Markdown Corpus](https://glasgate.ai/llms-full.txt)
- [AI Index](https://glasgate.ai/ai-index.json)

## Page Mirrors

- [Home Markdown](https://glasgate.ai/pages/home.md)

- [Platform JSON](https://glasgate.ai/pages/platform.json)

## Usage Notes

Content is generated from public, visible, canonical pages only.
Login, cart, search, filter, and tracking URLs are excluded.
Generated by glasgate.ai on 2026-06-06.
Hosted mirrors: /generated/demo-glasgate/
